config.script:
class cevaluatoritem private m_nComputed '0 - not computed, 1 - computing, 2 - computed private m_oValue private m_strExpression
private sub class_initialize() m_nComputed = 0 m_strExpression = "" end sub
public property get computed() computed = (m_nComputed = 2) end property
public sub mark_computed m_nComputed = 2 end sub
public property get computing() computing = (m_nComputed = 1) end property
public sub mark_computing m_nComputed = 1 end sub
public property get value value = m_oValue end property
public property let value(oValue) m_oValue = oValue mark_computed end property
public property let expression(strExpression) m_nComputed = 0 m_strExpression = strExpression end property
public property get expression() expression = m_strExpression end property end class
class cevaluator private m_pSymbolDict
private sub class_initialize() set m_pSymbolDict = doc_.system.activex("Scripting.Dictionary") end sub
private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pSymbolDict = nothing end sub
private function get_item_on_sym(byref pObject,byval strSymbol) dim strKey : strKey = cstr(pObject.type) + ";" + cstr(pObject.idobj) + ";" + strSymbol if m_pSymbolDict.Exists(strKey) then set get_item_on_sym = m_pSymbolDict.Item(strKey) else set get_item_on_sym = nothing end if end function
private function add_new_item(byref pObject,byval strSymbol) dim strKey : strKey = cstr(pObject.type) + ";" + cstr(pObject.idobj) + ";" + strSymbol dim oItem : set oItem = new cevaluatoritem m_pSymbolDict.Add strKey, oItem set add_new_item = oItem end function
private function compute_one(byref oObject,byval strExpression) dim strCode : strCode = "function result(byref oEval,byref oObject)" + vbCrLf + _ "with oEval"+ vbCrLf + _ strExpression + vbCrLf + _ "end with" + vbCrLf + _ "end function" + vbCrLf
execute strCode compute_one = result(Me,oObject) end function
public property get val(byref pObject,byval strSymbol) dim pItem : set pItem = get_item_on_sym(pObject,strSymbol) if pItem is nothing then set pItem = add_new_item(pObject,strSymbol) dim strExpression : strExpression = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(pObject.type).fields.get_field(strSymbol).getexpression if trim(strExpression) = "" then strExpression = "pObject." + strSymbol end if pItem.expression = strExpression end if with pItem if not .computed then if .computing then err.raise 7000,"Obliczanie wyników","Rekursja w obliczeniach symbolu: " + strSymbol end if .mark_computing 'obliczamy .value = compute_one(pObject,.expression) end if val = .value end with end property public property let val(byref pObject,byval strSymbol,byval oValue) dim pItem : set pItem = get_item_on_sym(pObject,strSymbol) if pItem is nothing then set pItem = add_new_item(pObject,strSymbol) end if pItem.value = oValue end property end class
function prepare_err_msg(byval strCode) prepare_err_msg = "Wystąpił błąd skryptu " + cstr(err.Number) + ", opis:" + err.Description + _ " dla wyrażenia [" + strCode + "]" end function
function new_evaluator() set new_evaluator = new cevaluator end function
